title: Robin Is Carried Away
description: The rescue force follows the Sea Train through the storm, with the Straw Hats and their new allies fully committed to saving Robin.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Sanji, Franky, Iceburg, Nico Robin, Spandam. The rescue force follows the Sea Train through the storm, with the Straw Hats and their new allies fully committed to saving Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: He'll be arrested at the other end.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Hey, you're... Paulie-san of the galley-La company....!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: That was a really early departure, huh?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Are you crying...? Geez.... those feelings are....

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: What's with you all of a sudden?!

dialogue.speaker: CP9 agent
dialogue.text: You'll be going to your death!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: BUT!! Nico Robin is throwing her life away...

summary: The rescue force follows the Sea Train through the storm, with the Straw Hats and their new allies fully committed to saving Robin.
